zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Moton於1375年12月8日出生時，他的父親Robert Morton47歲，母親Alice Basset47歲。他於1391年與Margery Mallory在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1424年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Moton于1375年12月8日出生时，他的父亲Robert Morton47岁，母亲Alice Basset47岁。他于1391年与Margery Mallory在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1424年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an altered form of English   Morton  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Moton was born on 8 December 1375, his father, Robert Morton, was 47 and his mother, Alice Basset, was 47. He married Margery Mallory in 1391, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1424, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Moton est né le 8 décembre 1375, son père, Robert Morton, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Alice Basset, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Margery Mallory en 1391, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1424, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Moton am 8. Dezember 1375 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Morton 47 und seine Mutter Alice Basset 47. Er hat 1391 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Margery Mallory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1424 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Moton è nato il il 8 dicembre 1375, il suo padre, Robert Morton, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Alice Basset, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Margery Mallory nel 1391, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1424, all'età di 49 anni.
